name: backend-registry
description: Implement BackendRegistry for schema-driven backend resolution with cascade lookup
acceptanceCriteria: IBackendRegistry interface with register, get, has, resolve, setDefault methods
register(name, backend) adds backend by name
resolve(schemaName, modelName) implements cascade: model → schema → default
createBackendRegistry() factory function for configured construction
index.ts: Barrel exports from backends/ including registry
Resolution uses meta-store to read x-persistence.backend from model/schema
Throws descriptive error if no backend found and no default set
